nodes.name: Hermes Authenticate
nodes.notes: POST /api/authenticate {username,password} -> JWT. Creds come from n8n ENV (HERMES_USERNAME / HERMES_PASSWORD / HERMES_BASE_URL), never hard-coded here. TODO confirm the token field name in the response (assumed `token` downstream).

nodes.name: Hermes POST (Add)
nodes.notes: POST /api/productsCatalogue {items:[...]}. 200 ok / 401 bad token / 422 processing error {msg,error}.

nodes.name: Hermes POST (Edit)
nodes.notes: TODO confirm with Hermes whether re-sending an already-submitted product via POST /api/productsCatalogue upserts it, or whether a distinct update endpoint exists. The documented API only exposes this POST, so the Edit branch reuses it for now.
